sys_update_xml.name: sys_security_acl_f616509ec341475468b2f54d0501316e
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>false</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Allow read for records in sys_remote_update_set, for users with role x_custom.update_set_user.</description><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>sys_remote_update_set</name><operation display_value="read">read</operation><script/><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-26 07:40:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f616509ec341475468b2f54d0501316e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>sys_remote_update_set</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_f616509ec341475468b2f54d0501316e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-26 07:40:48</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>
